name: @ptdl/plugin-conditional-format
description: Conditional formatting with three rule modes: Condition (style a column’s text/fill/bold/italic/border/icon when a condition on any field, including relations, matches), Colour scale (2/3-colour heatmap over a numeric column) and Data bar (in-cell bar). Rules can be block-level or GLOBAL (field-level): an “Apply to all views” toggle plus a central settings page save the rule set per collection so every Table and Detail view applies it automatically.
